caption: A screen recording captures a website for "CASEBREAKS.COM," featuring a list of NBA teams and a video feed of a man. The man has a beard and is wearing a black t-shirt, sitting in a room with a dark background. A chat window on the right displays messages from users "glowbug27" and "Nightbot," with Nightbot posting, "Click the link for the BREAKS SCHEDULE, SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://bit.ly/2SdeKqY." Above the video, a numbered list of teams includes "11. DALLAS MAVERICKS" through "30. MINNESOTA TIMBERWOLVES." Below the list, text reads, "You have randomized this list 7 times," with buttons for "Again!" and "Go Back." At the bottom, a red and white banner reads "JASYPS CASEBREAKS.COM." The frames are identical, showing a static image of the webpage and the man remaining still in the video window.
